title: miconia axillaris subsp. proctorii
intro: Miconia axillaris subsp. proctorii, also known as the Jamaican mountain apple or mountain apple, is a plant species belonging to the family Melastomataceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Miconia axillaris subsp. proctorii include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are commonly used in folk medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
